name: Project Management
description: Leading complex technical programmes from initiation through delivery, balancing scope, risk, governance and stakeholder engagement.

name: Project Delivery
description: Delivering technology change through structured planning, execution, governance and operational transition.

name: Telecommunications
description: Designing, modernising and transitioning enterprise communications platforms including PSTN, VoIP and unified communications.

name: IP Communications
description: Migration from legacy telephony to cloud-first IP communications including Microsoft Teams Calling and endpoint strategy.

name: Network Infrastructure
description: Infrastructure planning, endpoint connectivity, voice networking and technical readiness for large-scale deployments.

name: Data Analytics
description: Using structured data modelling and analytical techniques to improve programme delivery, reporting and operational decision-making.

name: Data Security
description: Understanding digital identity, privacy, data exposure and responsible approaches to information security.

name: Computer Science
description: Academic study of software engineering, algorithms, data structures, systems design and cybersecurity.

name: Software Development
description: Designing and building maintainable software with an emphasis on modular architecture, usability and long-term maintainability.

name: Web 2.0
description: Research into social platforms, online identity, data brokerage and the interconnected nature of modern web services.

name: Agile Delivery
description: Applying iterative delivery principles, stakeholder collaboration and adaptive planning within technical projects.

name: Vendor Management
description: Working collaboratively with suppliers and technology partners to deliver complex technical solutions and managed services.

name: Microsoft Intune
description: Endpoint management, device provisioning and modern workplace administration using Microsoft Intune.

name: Microsoft Entra
description: Identity, authentication and access management using Microsoft Entra as part of enterprise cloud solutions.

name: Cybersecurity
description: Security-focused analysis, research and system design across software, data and infrastructure contexts.
